description: CyCAT.org is the Cybersecurity Resource Catalogue, a public catalog for cybersecurity tools, rules, playbooks, processes, and controls. It provides searchable catalog data such as UUIDs, publishers, projects, namespaces, and relationships.
summary: CyCAT.org exposes one public REST API at https://api.cycat.org/, documented by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec and requiring no authentication.
